channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12878] PPC client: sanity test_130a: FIEMAP unsupported
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c922a322-eb0e-11e9-b62b-52540065bddc

test_130a failed with the following error:

trevis-55vm1 crashed during sanity test_130a

== sanity test 130a: FIEMAP (1-stripe file) ========================================================== 18:41:38 (1570560098)
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
65536 bytes (66 kB) copied, 0.000698402 s, 93.8 MB/s
/mnt/lustre/f130a.sanity: FIBMAP unsupported
Filesystem type is: bd00bd0
File size of /mnt/lustre/f130a.sanity is 65536 (16 blocks of 4096 bytes)
/mnt/lustre/f130a.sanity: FIBMAP unsupported
 sanity test_130a: @@@@@@ FAIL: FIEMAP on 1-stripe file(/mnt/lustre/f130a.sanity) failed;

OSS 

[ 8436.849514] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity test 130a: FIEMAP \(1-stripe file\) ========================================================== 18:41:38 \(1570560098\)
[ 8437.057214] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 130a: FIEMAP (1-stripe file) ========================================================== 18:41:38 (1570560098)
[ 8437.299865] general protection fault: 0000 [#1] SMP 
[ 8437.300962] Modules linked in: lnet_selftest(OE) osp(OE) ofd(OE) lfsck(OE) ost(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) ldiskfs(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_flakey rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache rpcrdma ib_isert iscsi_target_mod ib_iser libiscsi scsi_transport_iscsi ib_srpt target_core_mod crc_t10dif crct10dif_generic ib_srp scsi_transport_srp scsi_tgt ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_core sunrpc dm_mod iosf_mbi crc32_pclmul ppdev ghash_clmulni_intel aesni_intel lrw gf128mul glue_helper ablk_helper cryptd pcspkr joydev virtio_balloon i2c_piix4 parport_pc parport ip_tables ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic pata_acpi virtio_blk 8139too ata_piix crct10dif_pclmul crct10dif_common crc32c_intel
[ 8437.315044]  libata serio_raw 8139cp virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio mii floppy
[ 8437.316312] CPU: 0 PID: 9392 Comm: bash Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE  ------------   3.10.0-957.27.2.el7_lustre.x86_64 #1
[ 8437.318227] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[ 8437.319194] task: ffff9dd920d0d140 ti: ffff9dd912b98000 task.ti: ffff9dd912b98000
[ 8437.320431] RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffba1fe380>]  [<ffffffffba1fe380>] get_vmalloc_info+0x60/0xe0
[ 8437.321891] RSP: 0018:ffff9dd912b9bb30  EFLAGS: 00010287
[ 8437.322778] RAX: b0ee8f1ed99dffcf RBX: ffff9dd912b9bd68 RCX: ffffaee940000000
[ 8437.323951] RDX: b0ee8f1ed99dffff RSI: ffffcee93fffffff RDI: 000000000000a000
[ 8437.325133] RBP: ffff9dd912b9bb40 R08: 00001fffffffffff R09: ffff9dd93d001300
[ 8437.326304] R10: ffff9dd93d001300 R11: ffffffffba1d753d R12: ffffaee943797000
[ 8437.327479] R13: 0000000000000001 R14: ffff9dd912b9bf18 R15: ffff9dd939ae0f00
[ 8437.328650] FS:  00007f1340711740(0000) GS:ffff9dd93fc00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 8437.329994] CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[ 8437.330944] CR2: 00007f133fdf20e9 CR3: 000000000c6b2000 CR4: 00000000000606f0
[ 8437.332126] Call Trace:
[ 8437.332627]  [<ffffffffba2c33de>] meminfo_proc_show+0x8e/0x5e0
[ 8437.333635]  [<ffffffffba37e9c2>] ? radix_tree_lookup_slot+0x22/0x50
[ 8437.334697]  [<ffffffffba1b70de>] ? __find_get_page+0x1e/0xa0
[ 8437.335654]  [<ffffffffba1ba2ae>] ? filemap_fault+0x17e/0x490
[ 8437.336642]  [<ffffffffc04101d1>] ? ext4_filemap_fault+0x41/0x50 [ext4]
[ 8437.337745]  [<ffffffffba1e593a>] ? __do_fault.isra.59+0x8a/0x100
[ 8437.338762]  [<ffffffffba1b7b8b>] ? unlock_page+0x2b/0x30
[ 8437.339662]  [<ffffffffba1e5fd9>] ? do_read_fault.isra.61+0x139/0x1b0
[ 8437.340726]  [<ffffffffba1ea874>] ? handle_pte_fault+0x2f4/0xd10
[ 8437.341742]  [<ffffffffba269fc0>] seq_read+0x130/0x440
[ 8437.342613]  [<ffffffffba2b9880>] proc_reg_read+0x40/0x80
[ 8437.343537]  [<ffffffffba24256f>] vfs_read+0x9f/0x170
[ 8437.344383]  [<ffffffffba24342f>] SyS_read+0x7f/0xf0
[ 8437.345254]  [<ffffffffba777d21>] ? system_call_after_swapgs+0xae/0x146
[ 8437.346353]  [<ffffffffba777ddb>] system_call_fastpath+0x22/0x27
[ 8437.347354]  [<ffffffffba777d21>] ? system_call_after_swapgs+0xae/0x146
[ 8437.348440] Code: ce a9 00 48 3d 50 b2 c9 ba 0f 84 8b 00 00 00 48 8b 0d cd 70 a4 00 48 8b 7b 08 48 83 e8 30 49 b8 ff ff ff ff ff 1f 00 00 0f 1f 00 <48> 8b 10 4a 8d 34 01 48 39 ca 72 33 48 39 f2 73 3f f6 40 10 03 
[ 8437.353724] RIP  [<ffffffffba1fe380>] get_vmalloc_info+0x60/0xe0
[ 8437.354754]  RSP <ffff9dd912b9bb30>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_130a - trevis-55vm1 crashed during sanity test_130a
item.summary: PPC client: sanity test_130a: FIEMAP unsupported

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
